title: Love Love Love-udi lyrics Mappillai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Rahul & Rita
Song: Love Love Love-udi
Movie : Mappillai
Lyrics: Snehan

Love Love Love-udi, en laila neethaan di
Jill jill jill nenjukul ne vaadi
Dhil dhil dhil-uda ennai theendura killadi
Va va va paakalam, vizhayaadi
Ultra modela, vandha vennila
Amstrong muzhumayaai thozhaidhaal unnila

Cell phona pola naan sinuguren unnala
Sim carda pola nee vaayen ullara
Rocketa pola nan suthuren pinnala
Satellite-ah maari enna paradi kannala

Love Love Love-udi, en laila neethaan di
Jill jill jill nenjukul ne vaadi
Dhil dhil dhil-uda ennai theendura killadi
Va va va paakalam, vizhayaadi

Minsaram pachura poochedi neethan di
Minsara poova kooda mutham iduven naanthaan di
Kadhalan seikindra kayangal vazhikadhe
Kadavule thozhaindhal kooda kadhal mattum kuraiyadhe
Enenna uinbam serthu unnai thaan neidhano
Eppodhum unnai sutra ennai anaai avane seithano
Cell phona pola naan sinuguren unnala....
Love Love Love-udi, en laila neethaan di ...

Velvettu dhegatha parthadhum vizhdhene
kalvettu pola undhan kangal pattu azhundhene
Boomiya thaandiye poguren thannaala
Veroru gragathula vazhurene unnala
Aasaiku rekkai unndu aanalum parakkathu
Angathil asaivom seivom veru paadu kidayaadhe

Cell phona pola naan sinuguren unnala
Sim carda pola nee vaayen ullara
Rocketa pola nan suthuren pinnala
Satellite-ah maari enna paradi kannala

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Love Love Love-udi?

The song is a lively and romantic track that celebrates youthful love and energy.

Who are the singers of Love Love Love-udi?

The song is sung by Rahul Nambiar and Rita.

Who composed the music for Mappillai?

The music for the movie was composed by Mani Sharma.

What is the release year of the movie Mappillai?

The movie was released in the year 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Love Love Love-udi is a vibrant and energetic song from the movie Mappillai, capturing the excitement of young love. Sung by Rahul Nambiar and Rita, the track is infused with Mani Sharma's lively music and Snehan's catchy lyrics. The song portrays a playful and romantic interaction between the lead characters, adding a fun and dynamic element to the film. It evokes feelings of joy and enthusiasm, making it a perfect choice for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Love Love Love-udi from the movie Mappillai is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of youthful romance. Sung by the dynamic duo Rahul Nambiar and Rita, this song is a perfect blend of Mani Sharma's peppy beats and Snehan's catchy lyrics. Dive into the lively world of Love Love Love-udi and experience the thrill of love with every beat.
stanzaMeanings: Love, love, love, you are my Laila. You make my heart flutter. You touch me with excitement. Come, let's see, let's enjoy. You are like an ultra model, like the moon that came down. If Armstrong saw you, he'd be amazed.
I shine like a cellphone because of you. You are like a SIM card, connecting deeply. I spin like a rocket behind you. Like a satellite, I orbit around you.
Love, love, love, you are my Laila. You make my heart flutter. You touch me with excitement. Come, let's see, let's enjoy.

You are like an electric shock, my dear. Even an electric flower, I would kiss it. The pains of love don't matter. Even if God himself tried, love would not diminish. What joy did he give by creating you? He made me always revolve around you.
I shine like a cellphone because of you...
Love, love, love, you are my Laila...

Seeing your velvet-like body, I fell. Like an inscription, your eyes captured me. I go beyond the earth because of you. I live on another planet because of you. My desires have wings but cannot fly. We move together, no other way.
I shine like a cellphone because of you. You are like a SIM card, connecting deeply. I spin like a rocket behind you. Like a satellite, I orbit around you.
